attributes.action: Do not penalise immigrants who have claimed public funds when allowed to do so.
attributes.additional_details: This is turning back on the aid given and punitive to vulnerable groups who could be disabled, due to illness, or destitute. This is against human rights.
attributes.background: Not to add 5-10 years for those who've claimed public funds legally when allowed by Home Office to do so.

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament. 

You may wish to sign these open petitions:

​'Keep 5-year Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR) for those already granted asylum.'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751580

'Make a law to protect ILR from abolition and retrospective changes'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/742864

'Do not increase the time migrants with ILR need to wait to apply for citizenship'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751392
